2605.26114.title: MobileGym: A Verifiable and Highly Parallel Simulation Platform for Mobile GUI Agent Research
2605.26114.paper_summary: We present MobileGym, a browser-hosted, lightweight, fully controllable environment for everyday mobile use, targeting interaction fidelity without replicating proprietary backends. It enables two capabilities previously out of reach for everyday apps: verifiable outcome signals through deterministic state-based judging over structured JSON state, and scalable online RL through low-cost parallel rollouts. The full environment state is captured, configured, forked, and compared as structured JSON, and a single server can host hundreds of parallel instances, with about 400 MB memory per instance and about 3 s cold start. A layered state model and a declarative task-definition framework keep state programmability and task creation practical at scale, and a single programmatic judging mechanism delivers both deterministic evaluation verdicts and dense RL rewards. The accompanying MobileGym-Bench provides 416 parameterized task templates, including 256 test and 160 train templates, over 28 apps, with deterministic judges and a structured AnswerSheet protocol that avoids free-text matching failures. In a Sim-to-Real case study, GRPO on Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct gains +12.8 percentage points on the 256-task test set, and on a 59-task real-device signal subset, real-device execution retains 95.1% of the simulation-side training gain. Project page: https://mobilegym.github.io.
2605.26114.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 MobileGym，一個瀏覽器託管的輕量級、完全可控的日常移動使用環境，旨在實現互動真實感而不複製專有後端。<lb/>它實現了兩個之前無法在日常應用中達成的功能：通過基於結構化 JSON 狀態的確定性狀態判斷來獲得可驗證的結果信號，以及通過低成本的並行展開實現可擴展的在線強化學習。<lb/>完整的環境狀態被捕獲、配置、分叉並作為結構化 JSON 進行比較，單個伺服器可以承載數百個並行實例，每個實例約需 400 MB 的內存，並且冷啟動時間約為 3 秒。<lb/>分層狀態模型和聲明式任務定義框架使得狀態可編程性和任務創建在規模上變得實用，而單一的程序化判斷機制同時提供確定性評估判決和密集的強化學習獎勵。<lb/>隨附的 MobileGym-Bench 提供 416 個參數化任務模板，包括 256 個測試模板和 160 個訓練模板，涵蓋 28 個應用，配有確定性評判者和結構化的答案表協議，避免了自由文本匹配失敗。<lb/>在一個模擬到現實的案例研究中，GRPO 在 Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct 上在 256 任務測試集上獲得 +12.8 個百分點的提升，而在 59 任務的真實設備信號子集上，真實設備執行保留了 95.1% 的模擬端訓練增益。<lb/>項目頁面：https://mobilegym.github.io。
2605.26114.author: Dingbang Wu et.al.
2605.26114.authors: Dingbang Wu, Rui Hao, Haiyang Wang, Shuzhe Wu, Han Xiao, Zhenghong Li, Bojiang Zhou, Zheng Ju, Zichen Liu, Lue Fan, Zhaoxiang Zhang
